data: It was a very small, yellowish dot in the sky; I saw it for about 10 seconds and then it disappeared
Huge silver saucer shaped disc that was stationary and moving without sound that had bright white, red and teal lights on it
A blueish white, well-defined, vivid, two-dimensional, scalene triangle was observed in the western sky moving at a constant velocity
Single bright light moving slowly with brief hovering and slight directional changes, not resembling aircraft or satellite behavior.
Three seemingly identical objects coming in off the east coast of Florida
Vertical, stationary, larger than a 747 and maybe 30-60k feet, had plane flying below for a bit of perspective, clear skies.
A very bright shimmering object that was large at first then became smaller
Initially slow flyover that rapidly sped up towards the end, when it crossed the sky in a matter of seconds.
It was a wide compressed sphere with a red thing underneath; the light was somewhat weak but it hovered slowly
Noticed a star moving when I was trying to look at the big dipper
Was fishing and bright light appeared in the sky and was moving and then went below the horizon, super bright.
Two white orbs appeared behind be and my daughter they then started moving towards us slowly about 200-300 ft in the air for reference.
3 lights in the corner and a big one in the middle and it was fliyng by at a fast speed right over my head
I was driving home saw bright red lights I got scared looked up again it was a UFO I thought then gone in mirror.
Moving about 600mph from south east from the Grants Pass area toward Medford airport
One orange orb slowly moving through sky quickly changed and split of into two distinct orange lights one moving north the other south
Object would change direction to follow aircraft
I was in my room when my dad shouted that he saw a UFO, and when I went, it was a huge light similar to a plate.
A triangle-shaped object appeared, it was stationary looking to west, it turned and moved to south.
We are watching 5 moving objects look like star they are moving dynamically and moving up and down like orbiting each other
Can’t explain changing colors hovering in place flashing and changing shape
The revolve on each other like they moving up and down their light come and go off
It was just moving very slow if at all and hovering in one place
Dozens of white lights starting from a central point and flying in a controlled manner outward near the Big Dipper.
Rotating changing structure with detaching sphere
Object (size of a distant star or dot of light) moving at random speeds and directions in the night sky
Orb bouncing through the storm clouds moving during flash lighting
Two blinking star sized lights moving across the sky. Flickering as well, strange mark on my leg after it. Didn't itch like a bug bite.
White sky dot wobbled, shot west, reappeared as three connected points, turned transparent, split, and exploded.
I was driving home from a gathering with my family on Route 10 when I saw this black orb hovering above me. Recorded late, NOT a drone
We seen a red fireball with long red tail that slowed to a stop and turned white and then disappeared.
Many orbs floating across sky at various speeds. Some flying together. Some would stop and hover. One was triangular.
Four craft, two kinds: wavy rectangular undulating things with white lights behind them
Oblong Shape with a dome on top, white.
Two crafts. One with three white lights mixed with red lights in between the white lights. Another craft with a single white light.
Multicolor orb hovering over a building.
A star shining and flying low.
It was moving in a sporadic diamond formation while flashing red blue purple and white
